title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
